title: What should I do? — новые слова

items.example: I need to memorise these irregular verbs by Friday.
If you don't know the word, look it up in a dictionary.
You should practise your pronunciation every day.
Reading helps you expand your vocabulary.
Your pronunciation is good, but you need to work on the 'th' sound.
She speaks English with a slight French accent.
Grammar is important, but don't forget to practise speaking too.
Try not to translate everything from your native language.
I want to improve my listening skills.
The more you practise, the more confident you become.
